data.content:
Plan review requests revisions.

1. The plan must explicitly remove or rewrite the FOUND_AGENTS==1 fast path in both scripts/setup.sh and scripts/agent-wizard.sh. As written today, that branch re-registers a single detected command and resets action mappings, which would still clobber existing model variants and dispatch selections in the common single-agent case.

2. The shared reader mentions [agents."<id>"] input, but the plan does not add matching writer logic for quoted/free-form agent ids. That is a correctness gap because the settings API/schema accept arbitrary non-empty ids, so preserving existing agents requires TOML-safe quoting/escaping on write plus round-trip tests.

3. Expand the PTY/integration coverage to rerun both setup.sh and agent-wizard.sh against seeded advanced settings, metadata, and preserved pools/actions so a one-setting edit proves unrelated configuration survives unchanged, including the single-agent path.
